title: User Authentication
problem: Users need a secure way to log in and maintain sessions across the app.
analysis: JWT-based auth with refresh tokens stored in httpOnly cookies. Stateless server, tokens expire in 15 minutes.

decisions.rationale: Stateless servers make horizontal scaling trivial and remove@../ the need for a session store.

knownLimitations: Token revocation requires waiting for expiry unless a denylist is added
